screen.tomewisp.history.unavailable: History is unavailable; new messages are currently kept only in memory.
screen.tomewisp.history.interrupted: This request was interrupted when the game closed. Retry it manually to continue.
screen.tomewisp.model.selected_unavailab: Selected model unavailable: %s. Choose another model or repair its configuration.
screen.tomewisp.recipe.exact_unsupported: This recipe viewer cannot open the exact recipe.
screen.tomewisp.recipe.preferred_viewer_: The preferred recipe viewer is unavailable.
screen.tomewisp.recipe.viewer_unavailabl: No enabled recipe viewer is available.
screen.tomewisp.recipe.unknown_item: The recipe card references an unknown item.
screen.tomewisp.recipe.wrong_thread: Recipe navigation is not available from this thread.
screen.tomewisp.recipe.viewer_failure: The recipe viewer could not open this view.
screen.tomewisp.recipe.invalid_config: Recipe configuration is invalid (%s); the last valid settings remain active.
screen.tomewisp.detail.title: Details (click panel to close)
screen.tomewisp.detail.source_friendly: This content is supported by in-game evidence. Enable Debug Mode for technical details.
screen.tomewisp.debug.invalid_config: Debug Mode configuration is invalid; it remains safely disabled.
screen.tomewisp.settings.title: TomeWisp Settings
screen.tomewisp.settings.section_pending: This section will populate from its registered capabilities.
screen.tomewisp.settings.confirm_reload: Press Reload again to discard the current draft.
screen.tomewisp.settings.confirm_delete: Press Delete again to remove this profile.
screen.tomewisp.settings.confirm_billabl: This sends one small, possibly billable request. Press Test again to continue.
screen.tomewisp.settings.general.title: Player display
screen.tomewisp.settings.general.debug.d: Adds a separate, redacted technical section to Guide and settings details. It never changes requests or saved conversation history.
screen.tomewisp.settings.general.debug.n: Toggle Debug Mode. The current state is spoken in the button label.
screen.tomewisp.settings.history.title: Conversation history
screen.tomewisp.settings.history.scope.n: No world or server is connected
Connect to a world or server first
screen.tomewisp.settings.history.narrati: History actions are bound to the current player and connection. Disabled actions explain that history is busy or unavailable.
Deletes only your TomeWisp conversations for the current world or server.
Deletes your TomeWisp conversations across every remembered world and server.
Debug-only recovery that resets all TomeWisp test history after two distinct confirmations.
screen.tomewisp.settings.history.confirm: Press the action again to confirm deletion.
Database reset is broader than player history deletion. Press again to continue to the final confirmation.
Final confirmation: press Confirm reset once more.
screen.tomewisp.settings.diagnostics.nar: Friendly health cards include a text status and counts. Debug Mode adds a separate redacted technical section.
screen.tomewisp.settings.diagnostics.deb: Redacted technical diagnostics. Credentials, provider bodies, reasoning, paths, and other players are excluded.
screen.tomewisp.settings.models.name: Name
screen.tomewisp.settings.models.unavaila: Unavailable · check credential %s and profile fields
screen.tomewisp.settings.models.cannot_d: At least one model profile must remain.
screen.tomewisp.settings.models.save_fir: Save this new profile before making it the default.
screen.tomewisp.settings.capability.help: Choose what TomeWisp may use. Open a card for capability-specific settings.
screen.tomewisp.settings.capability.depe: A selected Skill needs a Tool that is disabled. Enable the Tool or disable the Skill, then save again.
screen.tomewisp.settings.capability.page: This capability does not provide a settings page in this version.
screen.tomewisp.settings.capability.reta: %s disabled entries are retained for optional content that is not currently installed.
screen.tomewisp.settings.capability.othe: An optional source of grounded in-game knowledge.
An optional read-only capability available to TomeWisp.
An optional guided workflow for a specific kind of question.
screen.tomewisp.settings.recipe.title: Recipe capability
screen.tomewisp.settings.recipe.preferre: The selected recipe viewer is currently unavailable.
screen.tomewisp.settings.recipe.source.d: Enable or disable this source for future recipe requests.
settings.tomewisp.capability.source.patc: Knowledge from visible Patchouli books in the active resource set.
settings.tomewisp.capability.source.ftbq: Visible quest progression and prerequisites when FTB Quests is available.
settings.tomewisp.capability.tool.tomewi: Recipes
Configure recipe visibility, recipe sources, viewers, and exact navigation.
Game environment
Lets TomeWisp identify the active game version, loader, and environment.
Resource lookup
Resolves player-facing names to exact in-game resources.
Recipe search
Searches known crafting and processing recipes.
Recipe details
Loads one exact recipe and its evidence.
Item usages
Finds recipes and processes that consume an item.
Inventory inspection
Reads the player's captured inventory for grounded answers.
Craftability check
Deterministically checks available materials and missing requirements.
Legacy recipe lookup
Compatibility support for older recipe workflows.
Player context
Provides a detached snapshot of relevant player context.
Knowledge source list
Lists the guide and documentation sources currently available.
Knowledge search
Searches indexed in-game guides and documentation.
Knowledge documents
Loads an exact indexed document with its provenance.
Patchouli structures
Reads verified multiblock coordinates referenced by Patchouli.
settings.tomewisp.capability.skill.answe: A grounded workflow for questions about items, recipes, and documentation.
settings.tomewisp.capability.skill.diagn: Checks why an expected crafting or processing recipe is absent.
settings.tomewisp.capability.skill.expla: Guides machine setup, power, inputs, outputs, and automation.
settings.tomewisp.capability.skill.guide: Uses visible FTB Quests progression and prerequisites when available.
settings.tomewisp.capability.skill.searc: Finds and combines relevant entries from indexed in-game guides.
